generation.image_prompt: Traditional mystical illustration in the style of 1900s lithography, with clean bold black ink outlines. FULL BLEED: Image content (trees, rocks, sky) MUST touch all four physical edges of the 2:3 image. ABSOLUTELY NO WHITE MARGINS, NO VINTAGE PAPER BORDERS, NO MATTED EDGES. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT, NO LABELS, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS IN THE ARTWORK. STRICTLY ANTHROPOMORPHIC. The subject is a Taiwan leopard cat standing upright on two legs with human-like posture and proportions. It MUST wear clothing or robes. Essential markers: white spots on back of black ears, white forehead stripes, and rosette leopard cat fur patterns. NO FOUR-LEGGED ANIMAL POSTURE. A majestic anthropomorphic Taiwan leopard cat dancing within a giant green wreath made of vines, flowers, and wheat. Around the wreath are the four elemental guardians (cloud, mountain, stream, field). Meaning: Success, the complete integration of wildlife into the modern world, and the ultimate harmony of coexistence.
generation.narrative: A majestic anthropomorphic Taiwan leopard cat dancing within a giant green wreath made of vines, flowers, and wheat. Around the wreath are the four elemental guardians (cloud, mountain, stream, field). Meaning: Success, the complete integration of wildlife into the modern world, and the ultimate harmony of coexistence.

meaning.zh: 完成、整合、成就、完美的和諧，以及一個完整無缺的健康生態系。
meaning.en: Completion, integration, accomplishment, travel, and perfect harmony.

ecology.habitat_fragment: a fully realized continuous habitat spanning the island
ecology.risk_theme: the ultimate goal of continuous, unfragmented wilderness
ecology.mapping_note: The World represents the ultimate completion of the conservation journey: a fully integrated, unfragmented landscape where the leopard cat moves freely as part of a whole, healthy ecosystem.
ecology.zh: 棲地樣貌：a fully realized continuous habitat spanning the island 。 生存威脅：the ultimate goal of continuous, unfragmented wilderness 。 牌義關聯：The World represents the ultimate completion of the conservation journey: a fully integrated, unfragmented landscape where the leopard cat moves freely as part of a whole, healthy ecosystem. 。 石虎特徵：台灣石虎 。 生命階段：integrated ecosystem

meanings.upright: Completion, integration, accomplishment, travel, and perfect harmony.
meanings.reversed: Seeking closure, shortcuts, delays, or an incomplete cycle.

website.excerpt: The cycle is complete. The World represents a fully integrated landscape where the leopard cat and nature thrive as one.
website.seo_description: The World tarot card reimagined as the ultimate completion of a fully integrated and healthy ecosystem.
